      - Output Optimization | papers: e5d0857feca845b474b89565d513ff599629851d; b899a28eb553800ce558cf8974a697f65103e591; b574245f3db22b5eb7fe64bd8b0a147dab467b60; 44162aa2763c88a384d9c51d60eafcc59277a1c9; e5aed8e930b1efa1a5e0aad7ecf3038084cb0a33; 041ab8f72343db5d50769eeb725398c689b2850c; b6c4a96e09b9f11e7c70e7f1fbe3f3971b92762d
        - Feedback | papers: 08e84c939b88fc50aaa74ef76e202e61a1ad940b; fa018aa098c28bd694b316ddf7e213641e7f86ad; a669ea57529f4db630043c8c75d8f840c485d24d; 91206346edbe28abb606d7b3425cd455d4019d4f; e0ca43a635d35fd0414ee76ca1e7c287715f5b00; 3648515cc35b517cdf60331cc4870e24616f9939; e1a642026fb46a8b8a868862bcf0728e8d215d7e; ebd1c04c61f73f46def3305ca11d038c46665b65; e2e52461194bc81351da7caa978ac42e9e9549cc; 023d462ec6ff84cee0d0716a34d11efc7cde8534; 0c4bf8ba0a17f6066490664e83d28567dd089a40; 600ff4c4ae9fc506c86673c5ecce4fa90803e987; be8db99310602d66bba64bcf41a572c45816fbfc; 7796f56c7b9c152ac9573c8bb34f716aa78b4e6d; 8c785ebee1f34464dbc85ab4113bccafd7a74b0a; 67f03ac399693393116076c0b8ec8ea05b910685; 6d7b8a478801bd9d21df82d5f33ae6eced90da5e; 4ba57555bef02f988f2ed3bab2f102733dc55221; 288e64e8adb23d81e291a2cb51e3a56b315023b7; cdd0e94e51a02bac22ca5e94fa95daa18f36e226; 65fb348291de709a379a3f0d00b48726a1a674d2; 9216ec4ce85502e2d81beec89f54423af7810403; 993df7df129f8d18816877d69923d7df7b347d85; ccd94602e3acecf999d0c9ba62b1a8bc02e9f696; 8deb5fd40e310dc4feb27f7db7019e734b44631b; df90ee11ed6378635f22e6d0061cf67dd0bacd13; 04d64be16fb402f28348faffef484bd419c8bd8f; 3707939a856655fcabf0acd5cba1a1009987b439
    - Pairwise contrast | papers: f3460dc3ae5cfd41099d576a3bb77411e1fc2e3f; 097d5045ad87b3992dbdf1f30a964e5952fd474d; a11d3cc04c3293df3e7ea3247c561f42fc36d1c5; 370fb62e60f80081015d591f8c10c5a59a56a32d; 6fe7e6ce3cc0ebd038caa456d73fd7472e7d6c38; 386cebdba39d2d5f2862a9ab43a8d807f3863dae; 973814cd535facbf4f27c3de477b05bf19366030; 5edcbf3ea678a7d9977555ecd59370452667597a; eabd317bf33a636b099a38f4b49aecca97202661; 22ab4219371366a4e890382bc0ca606130840ca7; cb3125e4f63f3d058a2a39270ecb585e86c3d1ff; 08436b3ddafd2edc798753ebc87f6ceffed6e8df; c3f1fae241a3c2449e675ab750873d800f95513c; 07038b2d2da9f1785a1e8e260a75c8215bd36ac7; 0d1c76d45afa012ded7ab741194baf142117c495; 49d25bf7d5f16da3f201f607d57411dd50bcf5f6; e360eb07461f2741793f99ece8b97a6c04fb2b68; 860c8de4fdac38695ff6860dd15312f1079c6117; f0dece803297c0f368142a33aaa3afdc7f3b42a4; 200a19739ef76cb91c490be72d409f0fb0468901; 891edceb78a274b0c2494d8176bc4d6f6e3f9cbc; b7c01c660055dc91ac8de8621d5f823f0aa3c46e
      - LLM-as-a-Judge | papers: 8deb5fd40e310dc4feb27f7db7019e734b44631b; df90ee11ed6378635f22e6d0061cf67dd0bacd13; 04d64be16fb402f28348faffef484bd419c8bd8f; 3707939a856655fcabf0acd5cba1a1009987b439
      - Preference Data | papers: 7b4f3d0e4e2486a8d5d3f8e00549cf9a117bf88f; cf4aa38ae31b43fd07abe13b4ffdb265babb7be1; 0286b2736a114198b25fb5553c671c33aed5d477; 2f3efe44083af91cef562c1a3451eee2f8601d22; d766bffc357127e0dc86dd69561d5aeb520d6f4c; 39d05ffbc06fdca54ea6a90cd6d7fca202809aaa; 4c8cc2383cec93bd9ea0758692f01b98a035215b; a122863d239643453195424c04067e89406246e1; 600ff4c4ae9fc506c86673c5ecce4fa90803e987
